title: Public Lands Institute Archive Metadata
description: Field definitions for archive.csv. CC0 Public Domain.

Location.description: Official name of the protected area.

GPS.description: Decimal degree coordinates of the park center or main entrance. Format: lat, lng.

Native_Lands.description: Indigenous nations with historical presence, including territorial context, treaties, and displacement history.

Tags.description: Keyword tags including state name, agency type, and conservation designations. Stored as array string [Tag1, Tag2] for Zotero compatibility.

Geological_Age.description: Age in millions of years and rock type. Format: ~450 Mya Ordovician limestone.

Ecology.description: Dominant plant communities, notable species, and habitat type.

Hydrology.description: Watershed, named waterways, and notable hydrological features.

Taxa.description: iNaturalist observed taxa groups (Plants, Birds, Insects, etc.). Stored as array string [Taxa1, Taxa2].

Acreage.description: Total acreage of the protected area per managing agency.
